creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: thierry
Date: Wed Feb 12 20:14:12 2014
New Revision: 344012
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/344012
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r344012/

Log:
  Development tools and base libraries for linux_base-f10. Required by
  some Linux applications such as Matlab, which allows the user to integrate
  custom C, C++, and Fortran code via the MEX compiler.
  
  PR:             ports/184549
  Submitted by:   Jason Bacon <jwbacon (at) tds.net>

Added:
  head/devel/linux-f10-devtools/
  head/devel/linux-f10-devtools/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/linux-f10-devtools/distinfo.i386   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/linux-f10-devtools/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/linux-f10-devtools/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Wed Feb 12 20:10:37 2014	(r344011)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Wed Feb 12 20:14:12 2014	(r344012)
@@ -1140,6 +1140,7 @@
     SUBDIR += linux-f10-allegro
     SUBDIR += linux-f10-dbus-glib
     SUBDIR += linux-f10-dbus-libs
+    SUBDIR += linux-f10-devtools
     SUBDIR += linux-f10-libglade2
     SUBDIR += linux-f10-libsigc++20
     SUBDIR += linux-f10-ncurses-base

Added: head/devel/linux-f10-devtools/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/linux-f10-devtools/Makefile	Wed Feb 12 20:14:12 2014	(r344012)
@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+# Created by: Jason Bacon <jwbacon@tds.net>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	devtools
+PORTVERSION=	10
+CATEGORIES=	devel
+MASTER_SITES=	http://archives.fedoraproject.org/pub/archive/fedora/linux/updates/${PORTVERSION}/${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}/ \
+		http://archives.fedoraproject.org/pub/archive/fedora/linux/releases/${PORTVERSION}/Fedora/${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}/os/Packages/
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	linux-f10-
+DISTFILES=	binutils-2.18.50.0.9-8.fc10.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
+		binutils-devel-2.18.50.0.9-8.fc10.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
+		glibc-devel-2.9-3.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
+		glibc-headers-2.9-3.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
+		gmp-4.2.2-8.fc10.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
+		kernel-headers-2.6.27.41-170.2.117.fc10.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
+		mpfr-2.3.2-1.fc10.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
+		cpp-4.3.2-7.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
+		gcc-4.3.2-7.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
+		gcc-c++-4.3.2-7.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm \
+		gcc-gfortran-4.3.2-7.${LINUX_RPM_ARCH}.rpm
+
+.if defined(PACKAGE_BUILDING)
+MASTER_SITES+=	http://archives.fedoraproject.org/pub/archive/fedora/linux/updates/${PORTVERSION}/SRPMS/ \
+		http://archives.fedoraproject.org/pub/archive/fedora/linux/releases/${PORTVERSION}/Fedora/source/SRPMS/
+SRC_DISTFILES=	binutils-2.18.50.0.9-8.fc10.src.rpm \
+		glibc-2.9-3.src.rpm \
+		gmp-4.2.2-8.fc10.src.rpm \
+		kernel-2.6.27.5-117.fc10.src.rpm \
+		mpfr-2.3.2-1.fc10.src.rpm \
+		gcc-4.3.2-7.src.rpm
+.endif
+
+MAINTAINER=	jwbacon@tds.net
+COMMENT=	Linux compilers and base libraries
+
+# LICENSE=	Various GNU
+
+ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=	i386 amd64
+USE_LINUX_RPM=	yes
+LINUX_DIST_VER=	10
+USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
+
+PLIST_SUB+=	NLS=""
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/devel/linux-f10-devtools/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/linux-f10-devtools/pkg-descr	Wed Feb 12 20:14:12 2014	(r344012)
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+Development tools and base libraries for linux_base-f10.  Required by
+some Linux applications such as Matlab, which allows the user to integrate
+custom C, C++, and Fortran code via the MEX compiler.
+
+WWW: http://gcc.gnu.org/
